memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_MEMCONF_Type *p_reg, uint8_t power_id, uint8_t ramblock, bool enable)
memberdef.name: nrf_memconf_ramblock_control_enable_set

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling or disabling given RAM block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
RAM block index. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_INDEX for indexing RAM blocks.
True if RAM block is to be enabled, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_MEMCONF_Type *p_reg, uint8_t power_id, uint32_t ramblock_mask, bool enable)
memberdef.name: nrf_memconf_ramblock_control_mask_enable_set

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling or disabling specified RAM blocks.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
Mask of RAM blocks. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_MASK for creating RAM block masks.
True if RAM blocks are to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting mask of RAM blocks powered-on in System ON mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_INDEX for indexing RAM blocks.
Mask of RAM blocks.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether given RAM block is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
RAM block index. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_INDEX for indexing RAM blocks.
RAM block is enabled.
RAM block is disabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_MEMCONF_Type *p_reg, uint8_t power_id, uint8_t ramblock, bool enable)
memberdef.name: nrf_memconf_ramblock_ret_enable_set

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling or disabling the retention for given RAM block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
RAM block index. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_INDEX for indexing RAM blocks.
True if RAM block retention is to be enabled, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_MEMCONF_Type *p_reg, uint8_t power_id, uint32_t ramblock_mask, bool enable)
memberdef.name: nrf_memconf_ramblock_ret_mask_enable_set

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling or disabling retention for the specified RAM blocks.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
Mask of RAM blocks. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_MASK for creating RAM block masks.
True if retention for RAM blocks is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting mask of RAM blocks retained in System OFF mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
Mask of RAM blocks. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_MASK for creating RAM block masks.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the retention of specified RAM block is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
RAM block index. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_INDEX for indexing RAM blocks.
RAM block is enabled.
RAM block is disabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_MEMCONF_Type *p_reg, uint8_t power_id, uint8_t ramblock, bool enable)
memberdef.name: nrf_memconf_ramblock_ret2_enable_set

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling or disabling the retention within the second bank for given RAM block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
RAM block index. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_INDEX for indexing RAM blocks.
True if RAM block retention is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the retention of the second bank in specified RAM block is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
RAM block index. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_INDEX for indexing RAM blocks.
RAM block is enabled.
RAM block is disabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_MEMCONF_Type *p_reg, uint8_t power_id, uint32_t ramblock_mask, bool enable)
memberdef.name: nrf_memconf_ramblock_ret2_mask_enable_set

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling or disabling retention of the second bank for the specified RAM blocks.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
Mask of RAM blocks. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_MASK for creating RAM block masks.
True if retention for RAM blocks is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting mask of RAM blocks whose secondary banks are to be retained in System OFF mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power block index.
Mask of RAM blocks. Use NRF_MEMCONF_RAMBLOCK_MASK for creating RAM block masks.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling or disabling given bitline.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Bitline to be enabled/disabled.
True if bitline is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting enable status for given bitline.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Bitline index.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting bitline address.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Bitline index.
Addres for given bitline.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting bitline address.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Bitline index.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting memory trim value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Trim index.
Trim value.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting memory trim value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Trim index.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting retention trim value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Trim index.
Trim value.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting retention trim value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Trim index.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether the second retention configuration register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the repair configuration for RAM blocks is present.
Symbol indicating whether the trim configuration is present.
Symbol specifying maximum number of available power blocks.
Symbol specifying maximum number of control RAM blocks.
Symbol specifying maximum number of retention RAM blocks.
Symbol specifying maximum number of the second bank retention RAM blocks.
Macro to generate a mask bit for the memory read/write margin MEMCONF trim.

parameterdescription.para: Zero-based memory margin trim index.
Internal placeholder, to be ignored.

briefdescription.para: Macro to generate a mask bit for the memory retention read/write margin MEMCONF trim.

parameterdescription.para: Zero based memory margin retention trim index.
Internal placeholder, to be ignored.

briefdescription.para: Symbol determining the maximum memory read/write margin trim size across all MEMCONF variants.
Symbol determining the maximum memory retention read/write margin trim size across all MEMCONF variants.
Symbol specifying bitmask collecting all memory read and write margin trims.
Symbol specifying bitmask collecting all memory retention trims.
Macro for getting index of specified RAM block.

parameterdescription.para: RAM bank index. Can be empty if specified bank has no index.
RAM block number.

briefdescription.para: Macro for getting mask of specified RAM block.

parameterdescription.para: RAM bank index. Can be empty if specified bank has no index.
RAM block number.

briefdescription.para: Macro for getting mask of retention enabled for specified RAM block.

parameterdescription.para: RAM bank index. Can be empty if specified bank has no index.
RAM block number.

simplesect.para: Retention of specified RAM block mask.

briefdescription.para: Hardware access layer for managing the Memory Configuration (MEMCONF) peripheral.
